method.en: Listed among this level's entrances/exits on the source wiki.
method.fr: Figure parmi les entrées/sorties de ce niveau sur le wiki source.

en.name: Level 10 — Bumper Crop
en.shortDescription: Endless wheat and barley fields under a permanent overcast sky, dotted with empty farm buildings and worm-riddled soil.
en.atmosphere: Dreary unchanging daylight with drifting rain and fog over cultivated fields, blurring any sense of passing time.
en.tips: Never dig deeper than a meter or the worms surface. Follow the dirt roads to find exits. Eat the wheat only sparingly.
